task_completion.description: Verify the Titanic dataset is loaded into a statistical tool or programming environment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A software interface or script showing 'titanic.csv' loaded from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\titanic.csv', with variables like 'Survived' and 'Pclass' visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the Chi-Square test for independence is executed on the 'Survived' and 'Pclass' variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An output window, dialog box, or script execution showing a cross-tabulation or Chi-Square test specifically run for 'Survived' by 'Pclass'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required text file is created or opened to document the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) open with the filename 'chi_square_results.txt' visible in the title bar or saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pearson Chi-Square statistic is documented in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the Chi-Square statistic value (approximately 102.889, acceptable within 100.889 to 104.889).

task_completion.description: Verify the Degrees of Freedom (d.f.) is documented in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the Degrees of Freedom value (exactly 2).

task_completion.description: Verify the P-value is documented in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the P-value indicating high significance (e.g., < 0.0001, 0.000, or scientific notation like 4.55e-23).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually computed the Chi-Square test rather than just typing expected answers from prior knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the statistical software's output window or a script's execution output displaying the calculated Chi-Square results before or while they are typed into the text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the specified file paths for the dataset and the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file explorer, text editor title bar, or software import dialog should show the exact paths 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\titanic.csv' and 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\chi_square_results.txt'.

integrity.description: Ensure the documented results match the actual output generated by the software/script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into 'chi_square_results.txt' must exactly match the numbers shown in the statistical software's output window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Chi-Square test results for Survived by Pclass on the Titanic dataset are: Pearson Chi-Square statistic = 102.889 (acceptable tolerance +/- 2.0), Degrees of Freedom (d.f.) = 2, and P-value < 0.0001 (actual value is approx 4.55e-23). The agent must document these three specific values in the results text file.
